title: Polar's Exploration Additions
description: A mod that adds features to encourage exploration.
body:
Polar's exploration additions is a mod that adds features that make the Minecraft world more interesting to explore while providing fun challenges and interesting sights. Some vanilla plus features are also included  extra [stone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a8e9f447636a7a9a86bf661e821d51bf93f0e66c.png) and [wood](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e430d6ee92ac711ee74f5c8863ff8b59e52c74b.png) blocks for building, modified loot tables, and extra [potion variants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bd4db70fe80aa2a6cfbb2d7db5b02bbee1aa9d68.png).

![New Stone Variants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2a405f692d05ae040f51941eddcd0ff374b2c613.png)
![New Wood Variants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cc14641367dd982a8d3ff4d8ebe54ee9567dc7fd_0.webp)
![Loot Tables](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7fc85f7bf7e2152c3c76c236c3e3980aeb37a5f3.png)

Other main changes include 8 [new biomes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/869040c2b2d3489a95f5a15fec9c429aa0c4eb58_0.webp), 27 [new structures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e9d7332a490b1e70d3c25fbc189af6eccdb415db.png), 10 [new mobs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a0ab08523909030338dce21b05904d054dfecb7b.png), a boss, a [revamped End dimension](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c34b84c067732548bea5ae6a4d105e6c8aa8d4ab.png), unique weapons, and plenty of other building blocks and items that fill in the vanilla gaps.

![New Biomes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/869040c2b2d3489a95f5a15fec9c429aa0c4eb58_0.webp)
